name: 大村公園
desc: 1599年に築城された玖島城（大村城）の跡地を整備して造られた歴史公園です。「日本さくら名所100選」および「日本の歴史公園100選」に選定されています。春には、花びらが多く優美なことで知られる国指定天然記念物の「オオムラザクラ」をはじめ、約2,000本の桜が園内を彩ります。また、5月下旬から6月上旬にかけては九州最大規模となる約30万本のハナショウブが見頃を迎え、お城の石垣や濠の風景と調和した美しい四季折々の花々を楽しめる名所として親しまれています。
descEn: Omura Park is a historical park built on the ruins of Kushima Castle, which was originally constructed in 1599. It is recognized as one of the "Top 100 Historical Parks in Japan" and the "Top 100 Cherry Blossom Spots in Japan." In spring, visitors can enjoy around 2,000 cherry trees, including the nationally designated natural monument "Omura-zakura," known for its elegant, multi-layered petals. From late May to early June, the park features one of the largest iris gardens in Kyushu, with approximately 300,000 beautiful irises blooming against the backdrop of the castle's historical stone walls and moats. It is a highly beloved destination for enjoying seasonal flowers.
